german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Customer-Facing Roles Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight gap indicates a competitive landscape for PM roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: More than half of the workforce consists of senior-level positions, indicating a strong senior-heavy environment.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site work over hybrid and remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: One-third of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with nearly a third requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
